title: 10 best herbal tinctures for stomach discomfort
description: Ginger tinctures helps with stomach discomfort because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties, which soothe the digestive system and reduce inflammation in the stomach lining. The bioactive compounds in ginger, such as gingerol and shogaol, work to calm stomach upset, alleviate nausea, and ease cramps, making it a popular natural remedy for indigestion, bloating, and irritable bowel syndrome (IBS)....
